command:
cd ~/Desktop/Projects/Autonomous-Revenue/01-accessibility-index/public && (python3 -m http.server 8801 >/dev/null 2>&1 &) && sleep 1 && CHROME="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" && \
"$CHROME" --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1280,940 --screenshot="/tmp/aaa-index.png" "http://localhost:8801/index.html" 2>/dev/null; \
"$CHROME" --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1280,1100 --screenshot="/tmp/aaa-pricing.png" "http://localhost:8801/pricing.html" 2>/dev/null; \
"$CHROME" --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1280,940 --screenshot="/tmp/aaa-report.png" "http://localhost:8801/sites/asambeauty.com.html" 2>/dev/null; \
pkill -f "http.server 8801" 2>/dev/null; ls -la /tmp/aaa-*.png | awk '{print $5, $9}'

cd ~/Desktop/Projects/Autonomous-Revenue/01-accessibility-index && cp /tmp/aaa-index.png assets/screenshot-index.png && cp /tmp/aaa-report.png assets/screenshot-report.png && git add -A && echo "=== staged (no secrets) ===" && (git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E "^\.env$|/\.env$|node_modules|/data/|scanner/|\.db$" && echo "!!! FORBIDDEN" || echo "clean") && echo "changed:" && git diff --cached --name-only | head -40 && git commit -q -m "feat: AAA Swiss-Minimal redesign + pricing/signup page + API CORS + autonomy

- Re-skinned the directory to Swiss Minimal via the aaa-design skill (Muller-Brockmann x Stripe x Linear): hairline rules, Inter Tight + tabular mono numerals, one green coding-accent. Self-scores 100/100 on our own engine.
- NEW pricing/signup page (the buy button): free-key form + Stripe Subscribe buttons, wired to the live API.
- API CORS so the static page can call it from the browser.
- Autonomy: keepalive.yml (10-min ping, no cold starts) + refresh.yml (weekly crawl -> rebuild -> commit -> auto-deploy).
- 41 tests green (25 crawler + 16 api), triple-audited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && echo "committed $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" && echo "=== gitleaks ===" && gitleaks git --no-banner --redact=100 2>&1 | grep -iE "no leaks|leaks found" && git push -q origin main && echo "pushed ✓ $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)"
